---
title: Development of an urban inventory for road transport emissions of NO 2 and comparison with estimates derived from ambient
  measurements
date: '2005-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- S.D. Beevers
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Development of an urban inventory for road transport emissions of NO 2 and comparison with estimates derived from ambient measurements

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, S.D. Beevers</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2005


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2005.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
